problem_solved: Provides integrated electronic patient record (EPR) systems for hospitals and healthcare providers, enabling digital transformation and improved patient outcomes through AI-enabled clinical documentation and care coordination.
customers: NHS trusts, hospitals, community health providers, mental health facilities
key_features: CareFlow EPR - cloud-based electronic patient record with AI documentation
BadgerNet - specialized maternity and neonatal care systems
CarePlus Child Health - children's health records with immunization tracking
business_model: SaaS with implementation and support services
why_varden_cares: Strong NHS market penetration with integrated care solutions; replicable model for digital patient records in emergency care settings with established clinical workflows

problem_solved: Provides clinical systems across primary care, community care, A&E, and pharmacy settings to enable integrated, connected healthcare delivery across the NHS.
customers: GP practices, A&E departments, community pharmacies, community health providers
key_features: EMIS Web - integrated clinical system for primary and community care
#1 A&E clinical system supplier for patient management and tracking
Community pharmacy management and medicines optimization
why_varden_cares: Market leader in UK primary care and A&E systems; strong integration capabilities demonstrate replicable patterns for emergency care workflow digitization

problem_solved: Provides field service management software optimized for healthcare, enabling mobile workforce management, scheduling, and care delivery coordination for NHS and private health providers.
customers: NHS trusts, community health providers, homecare services, private healthcare providers
key_features: Dynamic scheduling and workforce rostering for mobile care teams
Real-time mobile data capture and evidence gathering
Lone worker protection and compliance tracking
why_varden_cares: Field-first approach applicable to ambulance and first responder coordination; proven NHS adoption with measurable efficiency gains

problem_solved: Provides enterprise scheduling platform for healthcare appointments and referrals, enabling efficient patient booking, clinic administration, and referral pathway management.
customers: NHS hospitals, clinics, specialist care providers
key_features: 24/7 online appointment booking and referral management
PAS integration via HL7 and bespoke APIs
Patient self-check-in kiosks and portal access
why_varden_cares: Appointment scheduling infrastructure relevant for patient transport booking; NHS-standard integrations demonstrate healthcare IT playbook

problem_solved: Provides all-in-one digital care management software for care homes and domiciliary care, including care planning, rostering, and staff management.
customers: Care homes, domiciliary care providers, supported living services
key_features: Digital care planning with real-time status updates
Integrated rostering with time and attendance tracking

why_varden_cares: Care coordination and rostering platform with NHS assured supplier status; model replicable for non-emergency patient transport scheduling

hq_location: Salt Lake City, USA (with UK presence)
problem_solved: Provides emergency dispatch software and protocols (ProQA) used by emergency communications centers worldwide to standardize call-taking, triage, and resource dispatch.

IAED-approved protocols for medical, fire, and police dispatch
AQUA - quality improvement and data analysis tools
business_model: Software licensing with training and certification services
why_varden_cares: Global standard for emergency dispatch triage; proven protocol-based approach replicable for other emergency coordination use cases

problem_solved: Provides software and data solutions for EMS, fire, and healthcare to improve clinical, operational, and financial performance through integrated ePCR, billing, and analytics.
